title: 9分达人听力6 Test 5 Listening
source: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

groups.title: Sports Photography Course Registration
groups.desc:
Questions 1-6
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Caller's name: Chris Johnson The level of the selected course: suitable for $1$ How to register: no need for an $2$ Cost: $$3$ Date available: next course, beginning $4$ Telephone number: $5$ Requirement: bring two photos of different $6$

questions.title: The level of the selected course: suitable for 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 course、suitable；提示词 for，此处应填名词。
题目解析：根据 level 和 suitable 可预判，空白处要填写的是所选课程级别适合的对象。注意做题时不要盯着 suitable 或介词 for 搜寻，因为这两个词都很容易发生替换，而应搜寻定位词 course 附近符合预判的词汇。答案句为："Well, this course is intended for beginners only."其中 intended for 替换了题干中的 suitable for。因此答案为 beginners。

questions.title: How to register: no need for an 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 no need；提示词 an，此处应填元音开头的单数名词。
题目解析：根据 no need 可预判，空白处要填写的词会搭配否定信息出现。本题与上一题衔接较快，注意通过对话语义判断题目的推进，题目的难点在于答案出现在了提问当中，即先给出答案信息，然后通过回答给出答案的否定信息，所以在听的过程中注意随时抓取符合题干要求的词汇。答案句为："Do I have to go for an interview to register? There is no need to do that."因此答案为 interview。

questions.title: Cost: $ 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Cost；提示词 $，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题考查对数字的反应速度以及对干扰信息的辨识。定位词 Cost 原词重现，先是出现了干扰信息 45 dollars，不过它对应的时间是 last year。真正的答案信息为："… this year we have more funding, so the price has gone down to 38 dollars."因此答案为 38。

questions.title: Date available: next course, beginning 【   】
questions.answer: April 17(th) / April 17th / April 17 / 17(th) April / 17th April / 17 April
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 next course；提示词 Date，此处应填日期。
题目解析：根据 Date、next course 和 beginning 可预判，空白处要填写的是所选课程开始的日期。注意 next course 为题干条件限定，所填日期要符合这一条件。先是听到定位词 next course 原词出现在提问中，注意听随后回答中出现的日期："Then there is another one starting from April 17th. But if you miss this one, the next one is from May 1st."其中 another one 对应 next course，starting from 替换了题干中的 beginning（从……开始），而第二个日期 May 1st 为干扰信息，它是下下次课程的时间。因此答案为 April 17(th) 或 17(th) April。

questions.title: Telephone number: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Telephone number；提示词 Telephone number，此处应填电话号码。
题目解析：本题同样考查对数字的反应速度。录音中没有出现干扰信息，较为简单，在听到询问 phone number 时，跟上录音记下号码即可。因此答案为 0713 9587 302。通常，雅思听力中出现的电话号码为 6 至 11 位，平时要注意加强数字听写的单项练习。

questions.title: Requirement: bring two photos of different 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 two photos；提示词 different，此处应填名词。
题目解析：首先听到了含定位词 two photos 的句子，接着咨询者问照片是否有什么特殊要求，注意这时这道题才开始。答案句为："The weather of the two shots should be different."其中 two shots 替换了题干中的 two photos，different 原词出现，不过是在答案之后才出现。因此答案为 weather。注意听录音时要带着预判的词性去有意识地抓取，不要死盯题干的顺序或某个说法，因为通常情况下，顺序或说法会在录音中进行调整或发生替换。

groups.title: Curriculum
groups.desc:
Questions 7-10
Complete the table below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

content:
– Introduction by the instructor
– How to choose the appropriate $7$

– Workshop of how to $9$ pictures
– Advice on how to $10$ pictures

questions.title: How to choose the appropriate 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Saturday、Morning；提示词 appropriate，此处应填名词。
题目解析：注意不要通过搜寻 appropriate 一词做题，该词被替换的可能性较高，而是要结合 Saturday、Morning 这些时间点，抓取附近出现的名词代入题干。答案句为："On Saturday morning, the instructor will explain all the basics of amateur and professional sports photography and the differences between them, followed by instructions on the use of specific equipment for various sports …"录音中先提到了 all the basics，对应上一条信息中的 Introduction，接着 followed by（然后）暗示下一条信息的出现，其中 instructions on the use of 替换了题干中的 How to choose，specific 替换了 appropriate。因此答案为 equipment。

questions.title: Discuss the 【   】 to take photos
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Afternoon；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 Afternoon 出现后，注意通过语义抓取合适的名词代入题干。答案句为："… you'll have to work together to decide the best position to take these shots."其中 work together to decide 替换了题干中的 Discuss，take these shots 替换了 take photos。因此答案为 position。

questions.title: Workshop of how to 【   】 pictures
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Sunday、Workshop；提示词 how to，此处应填动词原形。
题目解析：注意不要过度关注 how to，因为该说法发生替换的可能性很大，而是要有意识地抓取动词原形。本题两个定位词出现于同一句中："On Sunday, there is a workshop taking place in a computer-equipped room where you'll learn to edit different shots."这一句中只有 edit 是动词原形且后面跟着照片，shots 替换了题干中的 pictures。因此答案为 edit。

questions.title: Advice on how to 【   】 pictures
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 how to，此处应填动词原形。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，注意判断语义信息的推进，然后抓取合适的动词原形。通过观察题干可知，第 10 题和第 9 题同为星期天的安排，属于并列信息，所以在听录音时，可以有意识地听表示并列关系的词汇或表达，然后搜寻附近的动词原形。并列信号词 also 暗示答案信息即将出现："There is also a section on some tricks to sell them."其中 some tricks to 替换了题干中的 Advice on how to，them 指的就是前文中的 shots，对应题干中的 pictures。因此答案为 sell。

transcript.en: Official: Good morning.
transcript.cn: 早上好。

transcript.en: Official: Community Learning Centre.
transcript.cn: 这里是社区学习中心。

transcript.en: Official: What can I do for you?
transcript.cn: 请问有什么可以帮您的吗？

transcript.en: Man: Oh, hello.
transcript.cn: 哦，你好。

transcript.en: Man: I'm calling about the sports photography course you offer.
transcript.cn: 我是打电话来咨询你们开的那个体育摄影课程的。

transcript.en: Man: I learned about it from an advert somewhere in the newspaper.
transcript.cn: 我是在报纸上的一则广告里看到的。

transcript.en: Official: OK, may I have your name, please?
transcript.cn: 好的，请问您怎么称呼？

transcript.en: Man: It's Chris Johnson.
transcript.cn: 我叫Chris Johnson。

transcript.en: Official: Thank you, Mr. Johnson.
transcript.cn: 谢谢您，Johnson先生。

transcript.en: Official: Is there anything in particular you would like to know?
transcript.cn: 您有什么特别想了解的吗？

transcript.en: Man: Yes.
transcript.cn: 有的。

transcript.en: Man: I'm eager to improve my photography skills.
transcript.cn: 我特别想提升一下自己的摄影水平。

transcript.en: Man: You know, my son has just joined the school football team this semester, and I want to keep a visual record of all these precious moments.
transcript.cn: 是这样，我儿子这学期刚加入了学校足球队，我想把这些珍贵的瞬间都用照片记录下来。

transcript.en: Man: But when I took shots, they were often too blurry.
transcript.cn: 可我拍出来的照片经常都很模糊。

transcript.en: Man: You see, I'm no expert.
transcript.cn: 你也知道，我又不是什么行家。

transcript.en: Man: So I'd like to find out about the level of the course to see if it's suitable for me.
transcript.cn: 所以我想了解一下这个课程的难度，看看适不适合我。

transcript.en: Official: Well, this course is intended for beginners only.
transcript.cn: 嗯，这个课程只面向零基础的初学者。

transcript.en: Official: But there will be an advanced course for experienced photographers next semester.
transcript.cn: 不过下学期会有一个面向有经验摄影爱好者的进阶课程。

transcript.en: Man: That's good to know.
transcript.cn: 那太好了。

transcript.en: Man: I think this course works for me just fine.
transcript.cn: 我觉得这个课程正好适合我。

transcript.en: Man: Do I have to go for an interview to register?
transcript.cn: 报名需要去参加面试吗？

transcript.en: Official: There is no need to do that.
transcript.cn: 不用的。

transcript.en: Official: We have plenty of vacancies right now.
transcript.cn: 我们现在名额还很充足。

transcript.en: Official: So if you plan to register, I can sign you up over the phone.
transcript.cn: 所以如果您打算报名，我在电话里就可以帮您登记。

transcript.en: Man: Great.
transcript.cn: 太好了。

transcript.en: Man: But before that, how much does it cost?
transcript.cn: 不过在那之前，请问费用是多少？

transcript.en: Official: It was 45 dollars last year for a single student.
transcript.cn: 去年单个学员是45美元。

transcript.en: Official: Luckily, this year we have more funding, so the price has gone down to 38 dollars.
transcript.cn: 幸运的是，今年我们经费更充裕了，所以价格降到了38美元。

transcript.en: Man: Oh, good.
transcript.cn: 哦，太好了。

transcript.en: Man: So when will the next course start?
transcript.cn: 那下一期课程什么时候开始呢？

transcript.en: Official: Let me check.
transcript.cn: 我查一下。

transcript.en: Official: Just a minute … It's Monday today, so there was a course that ended just last weekend.
transcript.cn: 稍等……今天是星期一，有一期课程上周末刚刚结束。

transcript.en: Official: Then there is another one starting from April 17th.
transcript.cn: 然后还有一期是从4月17日开始的。

transcript.en: Official: But if you miss this one, the next one is from May 1st.
transcript.cn: 但如果您错过了这一期，再下一期就要到5月1日了。

transcript.en: Man: That's too late.
transcript.cn: 那太晚了。

transcript.en: Man: I'll just register for the next course then.
transcript.cn: 那我就报名下一期（4月17日那期）好了。

transcript.en: Official: May I take your phone number?
transcript.cn: 可以留一下您的电话号码吗？

transcript.en: Man: Sure.
transcript.cn: 当然可以。

transcript.en: Official: OK, I've made a note of that.
transcript.cn: 好的，我记下来了。

transcript.en: Official: When you come to take the first lesson, please bring two photos that you've taken.
transcript.cn: 您来上第一节课的时候，请带上两张您自己拍的照片。

transcript.en: Man: Is there any special requirement for the photos?
transcript.cn: 照片有什么特别的要求吗？

transcript.en: Official: Yes, you reminded me.
transcript.cn: 对了，多亏您提醒我。

transcript.en: Official: The weather of the two shots should be different.
transcript.cn: 这两张照片拍摄时的天气要不一样。

transcript.en: Man: Like one on a sunny day and another on a snowy day?
transcript.cn: 比如一张是晴天拍的，另一张是雪天拍的？

transcript.en: Official: Yes, exactly.
transcript.cn: 对，正是这样。

transcript.en: Man: So apart from the photos, do I need to prepare anything else for the course?
transcript.cn: 那除了照片，我还需要为这个课程准备别的东西吗？

transcript.en: Official: Nothing more.
transcript.cn: 别的就不用了。

transcript.en: Man: Do you have a syllabus for the course?
transcript.cn: 你们有课程的教学大纲吗？

transcript.en: Official: Sure, you can download it from our website.
transcript.cn: 当然有，您可以从我们网站上下载。

transcript.en: Official: Just key in 'Community Learning Centre of Pinewood'.
transcript.cn: 只要输入“Pinewood社区学习中心”就行。

transcript.en: Official: You can also come over to the centre and get a copy.
transcript.cn: 您也可以到中心来拿一份。

transcript.en: Man: I'll just download it online.
transcript.cn: 那我就直接在网上下载吧。

transcript.en: Man: But can you please introduce the course in detail?
transcript.cn: 不过能麻烦您详细介绍一下这个课程吗？

transcript.en: Man: The course covers two days, right?
transcript.cn: 课程一共两天，对吧？

transcript.en: Official: Yes.
transcript.cn: 对的。

transcript.en: Official: On Saturday morning, the instructor will explain all the basics of amateur and professional sports photography and the differences between them, followed by instructions on the use of specific equipment for various sports, like long lenses and monopods for shooting football matches.
transcript.cn: 星期六上午，老师会讲解业余和专业体育摄影的所有基础知识以及两者的区别，接着会教你针对不同运动使用特定器材，比如拍足球比赛用的长焦镜头和独脚架。

transcript.en: Man: That's exactly what I need to know.
transcript.cn: 这正是我想了解的。

transcript.en: Man: What about the rest of the course?
transcript.cn: 那课程剩下的部分呢？

transcript.en: Official: On Saturday afternoon, there is normally a workshop on the technical side of things.
transcript.cn: 星期六下午通常会有一个技术层面的实操工作坊。

transcript.en: Official: For the photos that your classmates have brought, you'll have to work together to decide the best position to take these shots.
transcript.cn: 针对同学们各自带来的照片，你们要一起讨论出拍这些照片的最佳机位。

transcript.en: Man: Oh, that's interesting.
transcript.cn: 哦，那挺有意思的。

transcript.en: Official: On Sunday, there is a workshop taking place in a computer-equipped room where you'll learn to edit different shots.
transcript.cn: 星期天会在一间配有电脑的房间里开一个工作坊，你们会在那里学习如何修不同的照片。

transcript.en: Man: That sounds challenging.
transcript.cn: 听起来挺有挑战性的。

transcript.en: Official: Indeed, it is.
transcript.cn: 确实是这样。

transcript.en: Official: There is also a section on some tricks to sell them.
transcript.cn: 另外还有一部分内容是讲一些把照片卖出去的门道。

transcript.en: Man: To magazines and newspapers, you mean?
transcript.cn: 你是说卖给杂志和报纸？

transcript.en: Official: Yes, mostly to the publishing industry.
transcript.cn: 对，主要是卖给出版行业。

transcript.en: Man: Um … I'd love to …
transcript.cn: 嗯……我很愿意……

groups.desc:
Questions 11-18
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: The Heritage Clothes Exhibition was put together by
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Heritage Clothes Exhibition；提示词 put together by。
题目解析：定位词原词重现后，听到："People who live in the area have spent two years preparing this exhibition, which brings together some of the fascinating garments, ..."其中 preparing 和 brings together 替换了题干中的 was put together by，People who live in the area 替换了选项 B 中的 local residents。选项 A 和 C 在录音中均未涉及。因此答案为 B。

questions.title: The photographs show the clothes worn by
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 photographs；提示词 worn by。
题目解析：定位词 photographs 在录音中以 photos 出现，比较容易听出，接着听到："... were taken by some of the city's college students who are studying design and show the clothes being modelled by the real people who wear them in the course of their everyday lives."其中 wear 对应题干中的 worn by，the real people ... in the course of their everyday lives 替换了选项 A 中的 their owners。选项 C 的 design students 是照片的拍摄者，并非衣服的穿着者。选项 B 录音中并未提及，但出现了形似的 model，注意录音中提到的 model 并非"模特"之意，而是"穿戴展示"的意思。因此答案为 A。

questions.title: The exhibition called 'Toys from the Past' is

options.title: B
options.content: on show for a limited time.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 'Toys from the Past'。
题目解析：定位词为展览的名称，在录音中不会发生替换，很容易定位。首先听到了选项 A 中的 gallery，但并未提及是否为 new，信息不全，可排除。接着听到了 of all ages，据此可排除选项 C 的"尤其针对儿童"。真正的答案信息为："... and will be here for ten weeks only."其中 ten weeks only 替换了选项 B 中的 limited time。因此答案为 B。

questions.title: Visitors to 'Toys from the Past' are recommended to
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Visitors；提示词 recommended。
题目解析：本题与上一题题干中都出现了 'Toys from the Past'，可推断与上一题内容同属一部分，答案信息可能距离较近。本题定位词在录音中并未出现，但该录音的背景是面向游客的讲解介绍，所以 Visitors 这个词体现在背景信息中，并未直接给出，因此也无法起到好的定位作用，只能通过选项信息进行判断。录音中先后出现了选项 B 中的 dolls 和选项 A 中的 toy trains，但只是对展品的简单介绍。最后听到了选项 C 中的 board games，用了 should not be missed（不应错过）这一描述，符合题干中的 recommended 这一说法。因此答案为 C。

questions.title: The miniature toys are
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 miniature toys。
题目解析：定位词原词重现，比较容易定位，之后听到答案信息："These small objects are on loan from countries all over the world, ..."其中 on loan 替换了选项 C 中的 borrowed，由于连读，发音较快，容易错过答案。通过后面的 from countries all over the world 可排除选项 A。因此答案为 C。

questions.title: The biscuit factory made tins

options.title: A
options.content: for people all over the world.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 biscuit factory、tins。
题目解析：录音中先介绍了饼干工厂，随后才提及饼干罐头，答案句为："The factory manufactured round, square, triangular and hexagonal tins for a whole range of different occasions to celebrate national events, festivals, famous faces, etc."其中 round, square, triangular and hexagonal 替换了选项 B 中的 different shapes。选项 C 中的 famous people 在录音中被替换为 famous faces，但并不与题干中的 tins 直接搭配，而是跟 occasions 搭配；录音中的意思是饼干罐用于各种不同的场合，包括庆祝全国性活动、节日或是纪念名人等这些场合，并非直接为名人制作，可排除选项 C。选项 A 录音中并未涉及。因此答案为 B。

questions.title: People's favourite biscuit used to be
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 favourite biscuit。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，但选项信息并不复杂，因此也较容易识别。答案句用了 not ... but ... 结构，其中选项 B 和 C 并列出现在 not 这部分，可同时排除，而选项 A 中的 unsweetened 则以 plain savoury（普通咸味的）出现在 but 这部分。因此答案为 A。

questions.title: The hands-on activity allows people to
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 hands-on activity。
题目解析：定位词出现后，注意抓取动作类信息："... hands-on activity to fill your own biscuit tin."其中 fill ... tin 替换了选项 C 中的 pack ... tin，此处读得较快，注意力需要非常集中。后文还出现过第二次解释："Your job is to fill the tin with biscuits ..."若反复听不出，则属于语音问题，可尝试跟读练习。因此答案为 C。

groups.desc:
Questions 19 and 20
Complete the sentences below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
groups.collect:
The gift shop is located beside the $19$ on the ground floor.
Free $20$ are available for visitors' belongings.

questions.title: The gift shop is located beside the 【   】 on the ground floor.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 gift shop、ground floor；提示词 located、the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 gift shop 和 ground floor 在录音中原词重现，很容易锁定答案句："... there is a museum gift shop which sells postcards, souvenirs and hand-made pottery next to the information desk on the ground floor."其中 next to 替换了题干中的 beside，抓取其后的词汇即可。因此答案为 information desk。注意积累旅游场景中有关博物馆、剧院、美术馆等景点内部设施的常考词汇。

questions.title: Free 【   】 are available for visitors' belongings.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 belongings；提示词 Free、are，此处应填复数名词。
题目解析：定位词 belongings 在录音中被具体展开替换为 coats and bags，能识别出即可锁定答案句："... please make use of the complimentary lockers provided by the museum."其中 complimentary（免费的）替换了题干中的 Free，较难识别，但附近可代入题干的复数名词有且只有 lockers。因此答案为 lockers。

transcript.en: Welcome to the State Museum, situated in the centre of this truly multi-cultural metropolis which is home to more than 30 different nationalities.
transcript.cn: 欢迎来到国立博物馆，它坐落在这座名副其实的多元文化大都市的中心，这里居住着来自30多个不同国家的人。

transcript.en: The museum has a number of exciting displays and exhibitions.
transcript.cn: 博物馆里有许多精彩的陈列和展览。

transcript.en: And this audio guide is designed to help you fully enjoy your visit.
transcript.cn: 这个语音导览就是为了帮助您尽情享受这次参观而设计的。

transcript.en: There are 15 galleries in total, and this season sees the opening of three new exhibitions.
transcript.cn: 博物馆共有15个展厅，本季度还将开幕三个新展。

transcript.en: We suggest that you start your tour with these highlights of the season.
transcript.cn: 我们建议您从这几个本季度的亮点展览开始您的参观。

transcript.en: The Heritage Clothes Exhibition is located in Gallery 3 of the museum.
transcript.cn: 传统服饰展位于博物馆的3号展厅。

transcript.en: People who live in the area have spent two years preparing this exhibition, which brings together some of the fascinating garments, traditionally worn in their own communities.
transcript.cn: 住在本地区的居民花了两年时间筹备这个展览，把他们各自社区里传统穿着的一些精美服饰汇集到了一起。

transcript.en: They looked into the history of their communities' clothing traditions and the customs and rituals related to them.
transcript.cn: 他们深入研究了本社区服饰传统的历史，以及与之相关的风俗和礼仪。

transcript.en: Overall, there are 16 countries from five continents being represented.
transcript.cn: 总的来说，本次展览呈现了来自五大洲16个国家的服饰。

transcript.en: The photos that accompany each exhibit were taken by some of the city's college students who are studying design and show the clothes being modelled by the real people who wear them in the course of their everyday lives.
transcript.cn: 每件展品旁配的照片，都是本市学设计的大学生拍摄的，照片展示的是这些服饰由真正在日常生活中穿着它们的人来当模特。

transcript.en: Another remarkable highlight of the season is the exhibition known as 'Toys from the Past', which can be visited in Gallery 9.
transcript.cn: 本季度另一个引人注目的亮点是名为“往日玩具”的展览，可以在9号展厅参观。

transcript.en: This exhibition appealing to people of all ages is on tour throughout the country and will be here for ten weeks only.
transcript.cn: 这个展览老少皆宜，目前正在全国巡展，在这里只展出十周。

transcript.en: Items on display include dolls produced over a century ago with beautiful porcelain faces and, in some cases, real hair.
transcript.cn: 展出的物品包括一百多年前制作的娃娃，它们有着精美的瓷制脸庞，有些甚至还带着真发。

transcript.en: The whole collection covers antique toys such as wooden train sets from many different generations and offers plenty of fun to children and adults.
transcript.cn: 整个藏品涵盖了不同年代的古董玩具，比如木制火车套装，能给大人小孩都带来很多乐趣。

transcript.en: The gigantic board games laid out on the gallery floor are among the most popular activities in the exhibition and should not be missed.
transcript.cn: 铺在展厅地板上的那些巨型棋盘游戏是本次展览中最受欢迎的活动之一，千万别错过。

transcript.en: A special display of miniature toys brings this exhibition to an end.
transcript.cn: 本次展览以一批微型玩具的特别陈列作为收尾。

transcript.en: These small objects are on loan from countries all over the world, some of which measure no more than a few centimetres.
transcript.cn: 这些小物件是从世界各国借来的，其中有些还不到几厘米大。

transcript.en: There is a tiny car made from match sticks, a toy aeroplane with the pilot and passengers made out of seashells and some delicate mini houses no higher than 4 centimetres.
transcript.cn: 有用火柴棒做的小汽车，有用贝壳做出飞行员和乘客的玩具飞机，还有一些不超过4厘米高的精致迷你房屋。

transcript.en: The final highlight of the season is the Biscuit Gallery No.15.
transcript.cn: 本季度最后一个亮点是15号饼干展厅。

transcript.en: About two decades ago, this city was renowned for its biscuits, although today the factory no longer exists.
transcript.cn: 大约二十年前，这座城市曾以饼干闻名，尽管如今那家工厂已经不复存在了。

transcript.en: Did you know, for example, that before biscuits were wrapped in paper or cardboard boxes, biscuit tins were fashion items?
transcript.cn: 举个例子，您知道吗，在饼干还没用纸或纸盒包装之前，饼干铁盒可是很时髦的物件。

transcript.en: The factory manufactured round, square, triangular and hexagonal tins for a whole range of different occasions to celebrate national events, festivals, famous faces, etc.
transcript.cn: 那家工厂制作过圆形、方形、三角形和六边形的铁盒，用于各种不同的场合，比如庆祝国家大事、节日、纪念名人等等。

transcript.en: One fascinating exhibition displays people's favourite biscuits.
transcript.cn: 有一个很有意思的展览展出了人们最喜爱的饼干。

transcript.en: There are sweet biscuits and savoury ones, biscuits filled with jam and biscuits filled with currants, biscuits with coloured toppings from sugar icing to chocolate sprinkles.
transcript.cn: 有甜饼干也有咸饼干，有夹果酱的、有夹葡萄干的，还有裹着各种彩色配料的，从糖霜到巧克力碎屑应有尽有。

transcript.en: When the factory finally closed, it announced that people's favourite biscuit was not as you might expect a chocolate biscuit or one filled with jam and cream, but a plain savoury one which was eaten with cheese.
transcript.cn: 工厂最终关门时曾公布，人们最喜欢的饼干并不是你以为的巧克力饼干或夹果酱奶油的饼干，而是一种就着奶酪吃的、口味清淡的咸饼干。

transcript.en: When you get to the end of the exhibition, there is an entertaining hands-on activity to fill your own biscuit tin.
transcript.cn: 走到展览末尾时，还有一个好玩的动手活动，让你亲手把自己的饼干盒装满。

transcript.en: All the biscuits ever produced by the company are piled up on the table along with various tins.
transcript.cn: 这家公司曾经生产过的所有饼干，连同各式各样的铁盒，都堆放在桌子上。

transcript.en: These biscuit replicas are made out of thin pieces of wood, but the weight, colours and shapes highly resemble the original biscuits.
transcript.cn: 这些仿真饼干是用薄薄的木片做的，但重量、颜色和形状都跟真饼干非常相似。

transcript.en: Your job is to fill the tin with biscuits, and when the lid is taken off, the biscuits are neatly placed as if the job were performed by a machine.
transcript.cn: 你的任务是把铁盒装满饼干，等把盖子拿开时，饼干要摆放得整整齐齐，就像是机器装的一样。

transcript.en: It may not be as easy as it seems.
transcript.cn: 这可能没看上去那么容易。

transcript.en: If you would like to buy a memento of your visit, there is a museum gift shop which sells postcards, souvenirs and hand-made pottery next to the information desk on the ground floor.
transcript.cn: 如果您想买点纪念品，一楼服务台旁边有一间博物馆礼品店，出售明信片、纪念品和手工陶器。

transcript.en: And finally, if you don't want to carry your coats and bags around with you during your visit, please make use of the complimentary lockers provided by the museum.
transcript.cn: 最后，如果您不想在参观时随身拎着外套和包，欢迎使用博物馆提供的免费储物柜。

transcript.en: Enjoy your visit!
transcript.cn: 祝您参观愉快！

groups.desc:
Questions 21-24
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: What is the topic of the research?

options.title: A
options.content: the effect of music on consumers

options.title: B
options.content: the effect of music on eating

options.title: C
options.content: the effect of music on the price of food

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 topic。
题目解析：注意题干定位词 topic 容易发生替换，在做题过程中不可死板地抓字眼，而应通过语义的推进进行定位。本题可通过 Dan 的提问“… what is it exactly about?”定位，答案出现在 Jeannie 的回答中：“… I read a report that said 'if appropriate music is played while people are eating, it may cause some changes in their behaviour'. But the report didn't illustrate the changes in detail, so I wanted to carry out a thorough investigation into this.”其中 changes 为选项中 effect 的同义替换。切勿因录音中提到 eating 而错选 B，因为录音中强调的是播放的音乐对消费者行为的影响（music … may cause some changes in their behaviour）。因此答案为 A。

questions.title: The research finds out in the restaurant

options.title: B
options.content: the music is played at a uniform volume level.

options.title: C
options.content: the music is played at a certain time.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 restaurant。
题目解析：定位词出现得较早，但通过题干可知，本题考查的是研究发现，所以在听到 research finds out 的同义替换 Findings … indicate 时应集中注意力。首先听到：“… they all have a special section to play the music.”其中 a special section 与选项 A 中的 everywhere 矛盾，可排除。随后听到：“More importantly, although the music is played at different times, the volume is unchanged.”其中 at different times 与选项 C 中的 at a certain time 矛盾，故排除选项 C，而 unchanged（不变）替换了选项 B 中的 uniform（一致的）。因此答案为 B。

questions.title: The first few questions in the questionnaire are

options.title: A
options.content: to understand people's taste in music.

options.title: C
options.content: to disguise the purpose of the survey.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 first few questions、questionnaire。
题目解析：定位词 questionnaire 原词重现，而另一个定位词 first few questions 在录音中被替换为 the first section 以及之后出现的 These early questions，从而锁定答案句：“These early questions don't involve musical preferences, but largely act as 'distracters' – the intention being that subjects would be less inclined to think that the survey is about the music being played.”此处用了 not … but … 结构，否定了前半句，肯定了后半句。其中前半句中的 musical preferences 对应选项 A 中的 taste in music，可排除；而后半句中的 distracters 以及 be less inclined to think 为选项 C 中 disguise（掩饰）的同义替换，故正确。选项 B 与选项 C 本身为相反表达，也可排除。因此答案为 C。

questions.title: The questions in the questionnaire came from
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 came from。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词。题目考查问卷问题的来源，注意通过语义的推进定位。通过 Dan 的提问“Did you design the questionnaire by yourself?”可知题干信息的出现，Jeannie 对此予以否定（Actually no），故排除选项 C。接着提到：“I read an assignment a student wrote last year, which was just kept beside a dictionary in the library.”其中 assignment 对应选项 A 中的 study，last year 对应 previous。虽然选项 B 中的 dictionary 出现在录音中，但并非问卷问题的来源。因此答案为 A。

groups.question_title: Which TWO are the main reasons given for choosing a restaurant?
groups.desc:
Questions 25 and 26
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 main reasons。
题目解析：通过 Jeannie 提到的 why 以及 Several reasons 可推断与题干相关的信息即将出现。首先听到选项 D 中的 service，不过随后以 but that's not the case 否定，并在下一句中进行了解释，指出只有 12% 的人选了这一原因，可排除。接着由转折信号词 while 引出第一个答案信息：“… while the majority of respondents think whether they will pick this restaurant depends on how many available seats it has.”其中 how many available seats 替换了选项 E 的 seat capacity，故选项 E 正确。然后听到了选项 C 中 transport 的相关信息，不过 Jeannie 通过 It used to be 及 don't have to be worried 予以否定，可排除。最后由转折信号词 however 引出第二个答案信息：“… a large percentage of people say they will compare different restaurants in the neighbourhood on the Internet first. If one of them stands out from its rivals, they will choose it.”其中 in the neighbourhood 替换了选项 A 中的 nearby，rivals 替换了 competitors，故选项 A 正确。选项 B 在录音中未涉及。因此答案为 A & E。

听前预测：提示词 main reasons。
题目解析：通过 Jeannie 提到的 why 以及 Several reasons 可推断与题干相关的信息即将出现。首先听到选项 D 中的 service，不过随后以 but that's not the case 否定，并在下一句中进行了解释，指出只有 12% 的人选了这一原因，可排除。接着由转折信号词 while 引出第一个答案信息：“… while the majority of respondents think whether they will pick this restaurant depends on how many available seats it has.”其中 how many available seats 替换了选项 E 的 seat capacity，故选项 E 正确。然后听到了选项 C 中 transport 的相关信息，不过 Jeannie 通过 It used to be 及 don't have to be worried 予以否定，可排除。最后由转折信号词 however 引出第二个答案信息：“… a large percentage of people say they will compare different restaurants in the neighbourhood on the Internet first. If one of them stands out from its rivals, they will choose it.”其中 in the neighbourhood 替换了选项 A 中的 nearby，rivals 替换了 competitors，故选项 A 正确。选项 B 在录音中未涉及。因此答案为 A & E。

groups.question_title: What is people's attitude toward playing each of the following music in restaurants?
groups.desc:
Questions 27-30
What is people's attitude toward playing each of the following music in restaurants?
Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-F, next to Questions 27-30.

list.title: A
list.content: People will spend more money in the restaurant.

list.title: B
list.content: People don't even notice the music.

list.title: D
list.content: People don't think the restaurant is worth the price.

list.title: E
list.content: People will leave the restaurant right after eating.

list.title: F
list.content: People don't like the restaurant at all.

questions.title: no music
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 no music。
题目解析：定位词 no music 在录音中被替换为 isn't any music，但比较容易识别。之后听到：“… they will think the restaurant charges too much.”其中 will think … charges too much 替换了选项 D 中的 don't think … is worth the price。因此答案为 D。

questions.title: jazz
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 jazz。
题目解析：定位词 jazz 在录音中原词重现，随后出现答案相关信息：“… they tend to stay at the restaurant longer and order more food to enjoy the music.”其中 order more food 替换了选项 A 中的 spend more money。因此答案为 A。

questions.title: classical music
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 classical music。
题目解析：定位词 classical music 同样原词重现，答案句随即出现：“… they wouldn't like to stay there for another minute, but to finish the food quickly and hurry away, because …”其中 finish the food quickly and hurry away 替换了选项 E 中的 leave the restaurant right after eating。随后对原因进行了说明，注意录音说的是不喜欢这种音乐，并非选项 F 中的不喜欢这家餐厅，信息不完全对应，可排除选项 F。因此答案为 E。

questions.title: pop music
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 pop music。
题目解析：定位词 pop music 原词重现，但出现得较早，可通过表示结果的信号词 As a result 锁定答案句：“… this greatly increases the possibility of their presence at the same restaurant.”其中 their presence（出现）at the same restaurant 替换了选项 C 中的 come back again。因此答案为 C。

transcript.en: Jeannie: Hi Dan.
transcript.cn: 嗨，Dan。

transcript.en: Jeannie: How's it going?
transcript.cn: 最近怎么样？

transcript.en: Dan: Hello Jeannie.
transcript.cn: 你好，Jeannie。

transcript.en: Dan: Pretty well, thanks.
transcript.cn: 挺好的，谢谢。

transcript.en: Dan: Have you finished your research yet?
transcript.cn: 你的研究做完了吗？

transcript.en: Jeannie: Yes, it's all done.
transcript.cn: 做完了，全都搞定了。

transcript.en: Jeannie: I've spent several weeks on it, from the very beginning of deciding the topic, to carrying out the research, and writing the essay.
transcript.cn: 我在上面花了好几个星期，从一开始定题目，到实际做研究，再到写论文。

transcript.en: Dan: Congratulations!
transcript.cn: 恭喜你！

transcript.en: Dan: It seems like a big project.
transcript.cn: 看起来是个不小的工程。

transcript.en: Dan: I know the research is to do with music, but what is it exactly about?
transcript.cn: 我知道你的研究跟音乐有关，但具体是研究什么的？

transcript.en: Jeannie: Well, at first I didn't have a specific purpose until one day I read a report that said 'if appropriate music is played while people are eating, it may cause some changes in their behaviour'.
transcript.cn: 嗯，一开始我并没有明确的方向，直到有一天我读到一份报告，上面说“如果人们用餐时播放合适的音乐，可能会让他们的行为发生一些变化”。

transcript.en: Jeannie: But the report didn't illustrate the changes in detail, so I wanted to carry out a thorough investigation into this.
transcript.cn: 但那份报告没有详细说明具体是哪些变化，所以我就想对这个问题做一次深入的调查。

transcript.en: Dan: That's quite unique.
transcript.cn: 这挺特别的。

transcript.en: Dan: So, how did you conduct your research?
transcript.cn: 那你是怎么开展研究的呢？

transcript.en: Jeannie: I started by looking for five different restaurants, and then went to each of the restaurants to order some food and observe other people.
transcript.cn: 我先找了五家不同的餐厅，然后分别去每家餐厅点些吃的，同时观察其他顾客。

transcript.en: Jeannie: I mainly focused on how the music is played instead of how people eat.
transcript.cn: 我主要关注的是音乐是怎么播放的，而不是人们怎么吃饭。

transcript.en: Jeannie: Findings of my observations indicate that the five restaurants have something in common – they all have a special section to play the music.
transcript.cn: 我的观察结果表明，这五家餐厅有一个共同点——它们都有一个专门放音乐的区域。

transcript.en: Jeannie: More importantly, although the music is played at different times, the volume is unchanged.
transcript.cn: 更重要的是，虽然音乐是在不同时段播放的，但音量是不变的。

transcript.en: Dan: Sounds attractive.
transcript.cn: 听起来很吸引人。

transcript.en: Dan: I've never read anything about this before.
transcript.cn: 我以前从没读到过关于这方面的东西。

transcript.en: Dan: In addition to observation, what other research methods have you used?
transcript.cn: 除了观察之外，你还用了什么别的研究方法？

transcript.en: Jeannie: I also distributed the survey questionnaire to people dining there.
transcript.cn: 我还给在那儿用餐的人发放了调查问卷。

transcript.en: Dan: What questions are posed in your questionnaire?
transcript.cn: 你的问卷里都问了些什么问题？

transcript.en: Jeannie: Well, the first section of the questionnaire asks subjects to indicate the number of times they have been to the restaurant previously, the number of people they dine with and whether they think they will return to the restaurant.
transcript.cn: 嗯，问卷的第一部分是让受访者填写他们之前来这家餐厅的次数、一起用餐的人数，以及他们觉得自己会不会再来。

transcript.en: Jeannie: These early questions don't involve musical preferences, but largely act as 'distracters' – the intention being that subjects would be less inclined to think that the survey is about the music being played.
transcript.cn: 这些开头的问题跟音乐偏好没关系，主要是起“干扰项”的作用——目的是让受访者不太会想到这份问卷其实是关于所播放的音乐的。

transcript.en: Dan: That sounds very reasonable.
transcript.cn: 这听起来很合理。

transcript.en: Dan: Did you design the questionnaire by yourself?
transcript.cn: 问卷是你自己设计的吗？

transcript.en: Jeannie: Actually no, I read an assignment a student wrote last year, which was just kept beside a dictionary in the library.
transcript.cn: 其实不是，我看了一份去年一个学生写的作业，它就放在图书馆一本词典旁边。

transcript.en: Jeannie: I came across it when I was looking something up in the dictionary.
transcript.cn: 我在词典里查东西的时候正好碰到了它。

transcript.en: Dan: Oh, you were so lucky.
transcript.cn: 哦，你运气真好。

transcript.en: Dan: Is there any other question included in the questionnaire?
transcript.cn: 问卷里还有别的问题吗？

transcript.en: Jeannie: Yes, subjects are also asked why they choose to dine at a particular restaurant.
transcript.cn: 有的，还会问受访者为什么选择在某家特定的餐厅用餐。

transcript.en: Jeannie: Several reasons are listed in the questionnaire.
transcript.cn: 问卷里列出了好几个原因。

transcript.en: Jeannie: I thought people would put service first, but that's not the case.
transcript.cn: 我本以为大家会把服务放在第一位，但结果并非如此。

transcript.en: Jeannie: Only about 12% of them have chosen this reason, while the majority of respondents think whether they will pick this restaurant depends on how many available seats it has.
transcript.cn: 只有大约12%的人选了这个原因，而大多数受访者认为，会不会选这家餐厅取决于它有多少空位。

transcript.en: Jeannie: They think it's terrible to eat in a crowded place.
transcript.cn: 他们觉得在拥挤的地方吃饭很糟糕。

transcript.en: Dan: Yes, everyone wants to enjoy a meal comfortably.
transcript.cn: 是啊，谁都想舒舒服服地吃顿饭。

transcript.en: Dan: Then I guess maybe the location of a restaurant is an important factor since no one likes to waste too much time on the way?
transcript.cn: 那我猜，餐厅的位置可能也是个重要因素吧，毕竟没人喜欢在路上浪费太多时间？

transcript.en: Jeannie: It used to be, but nowadays nearly every household has a private car, so they don't have to be worried about the traffic problem.
transcript.cn: 以前是这样，但现在几乎家家都有私家车，所以他们不用太担心交通问题。

transcript.en: Jeannie: What I find interesting, however, is that a large percentage of people say they will compare different restaurants in the neighbourhood on the Internet first.
transcript.cn: 不过我觉得有意思的是，很大一部分人说他们会先在网上比较一下附近的不同餐厅。

transcript.en: Jeannie: If one of them stands out from its rivals, they will choose it.
transcript.cn: 如果其中某一家比同类餐厅更出众，他们就会选它。

transcript.en: Dan: Wow, it's really interesting.
transcript.cn: 哇，这真的挺有意思的。

transcript.en: Dan: What else then?
transcript.cn: 那还有别的吗？

transcript.en: Jeannie: Well, the second section of the questionnaire asks subjects to respond to the music being played by rating so that the relationship between music and perceived atmosphere could be examined directly.
transcript.cn: 嗯，问卷的第二部分是让受访者给所播放的音乐打分做出反应，这样就能直接考察音乐和感受到的氛围之间的关系。

transcript.en: Jeannie: As a means of examining purchase intention, the final section of the questionnaire asks them to indicate the maximum amount of money they are prepared to spend on their main meal.
transcript.cn: 为了考察购买意愿，问卷的最后一部分是让他们填写自己愿意为主餐花的最高金额。

transcript.en: Dan: So what have you finally discovered?
transcript.cn: 那你最终发现了什么？

transcript.en: Jeannie: I collected all the questionnaires and analysed people's answers to get a clear idea of their reactions to different music conditions.
transcript.cn: 我把所有问卷都收集起来，分析了大家的回答，从而清楚地了解他们对不同音乐环境的反应。

transcript.en: Jeannie: The result shows that music has become an indispensable part of restaurants.
transcript.cn: 结果显示，音乐已经成了餐厅不可或缺的一部分。

transcript.en: Jeannie: If people find there isn't any music during the meal, they will think the restaurant charges too much.
transcript.cn: 如果人们发现用餐时没有任何音乐，他们就会觉得这家餐厅收费太高了。

transcript.en: Dan: Yes, now music is everywhere in our life.
transcript.cn: 是啊，如今音乐在我们生活中无处不在。

transcript.en: Dan: Is there any difference in people's attitudes towards different musical styles?
transcript.cn: 人们对不同音乐风格的态度有区别吗？

transcript.en: Jeannie: Yes.
transcript.cn: 有的。

transcript.en: Jeannie: Most people think that if jazz is being played when eating, they tend to stay at the restaurant longer and order more food to enjoy the music.
transcript.cn: 大多数人觉得，吃饭时如果放的是爵士乐，他们往往会在餐厅待得更久，还会多点些吃的，好一边享受音乐。

transcript.en: Jeannie: But this is quite the opposite of what happens when classical music is played.
transcript.cn: 但放古典音乐时的情况恰恰相反。

transcript.en: Jeannie: Many customers think if the restaurant plays classical music, they wouldn't like to stay there for another minute, but to finish the food quickly and hurry away, because they don't like this type of music at all.
transcript.cn: 很多顾客觉得，如果餐厅放古典音乐，他们一分钟都不想多待，只想赶紧把饭吃完然后走人，因为他们根本不喜欢这种音乐。

transcript.en: Jeannie: And lastly, about pop music, it's very popular these days, especially among young people, as I've noticed in restaurants.
transcript.cn: 最后是流行音乐，正如我在餐厅里注意到的，这种音乐现在很受欢迎，尤其是在年轻人中间。

transcript.en: Jeannie: They like listening to this type of music during their meals.
transcript.cn: 他们喜欢在用餐时听这种音乐。

transcript.en: Jeannie: As a result, this greatly increases the possibility of their presence at the same restaurant.
transcript.cn: 因此，这大大提高了他们再次光顾同一家餐厅的可能性。

transcript.en: Dan: Great.
transcript.cn: 太棒了。

transcript.en: Dan: I've learned a lot from your research.
transcript.cn: 我从你的研究里学到了很多。

transcript.en: Dan: I think it's meaningful and innovative.
transcript.cn: 我觉得它既有意义又有新意。

transcript.en: Dan: Thanks for telling me, Jeannie.
transcript.cn: 谢谢你跟我分享，Jeannie。

transcript.en: Jeannie: You are welcome, Dan.
transcript.cn: 不客气，Dan。

groups.title: Cube Houses
groups.desc:
Questions 31-40
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.collect: Background Information • After World War II, local urban planners wanted to redevelop and revive the city. • Altogether, the Cube Houses can function as a $31$. • Each cube building is in the shape of a $32$. • The Cube Houses sit on top of a $33$ for pedestrians to the central city. • During construction, the work was temporarily discontinued because the designer faced the problem of $34$. Design Features of the Cube Houses • Underneath the houses, there are three pillars made of $35$. • A new building is situated between a warehouse and a $36$ of architecture. • It is a three-storey building: – The ground floor is an entrance. – Both the lower level and the top level of each house are in the shape of a $37$. – The first floor has a living room and an open kitchen. – The medium level has a bathroom and two bedrooms. – The top floor is sometimes used as a small $38$. Living in the Cube Houses • There is a nearby market $39$ across the square from the Cube Houses. • For guests, two advantages of the house are its convenient $40$ and reasonable price.

questions.title: Altogether, the Cube Houses can function as a 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 function、a，此处应填表示房屋功能的单数名词。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，Cube Houses 为主题词，在录音中会反复出现，无法用于定位。可通过上一条信息中的 World War II 定位，但该时间的出现距离答案句较远，考验考生的心态，建议在该时间出现后，结合语义有意识地抓取符合预判的词汇。答案句为："He designed the Cube Houses to recreate daily life in a village where individuals are closely connected and yet have their own separate space."该句的前一句中提到 Blom 认为城市社区的居民应该共同生活在一个屋顶下，所以他设计了 Cube Houses 来再现村庄的日常生活，因此 Cube Houses 的设计是为了发挥村庄的功能。因此答案为 village。

questions.title: Each cube building is in the shape of a 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Each cube building；提示词 shape、a，此处应填表示房屋形状的单数名词。
题目解析：本题的关键在于正确识别定位信息。注意 shape 不能作为定位词，该词较容易被替换为具体形状。另外，形状类考查方向通常为几何形状或具体的物品，例如 square、cigar 等词。本题定位词 Each cube building 在录音中被替换为 each elevated cube，比较容易听出，可锁定答案句为："… that each elevated cube seems like a tree."其中 seems like 替换了题干中的 in the shape of，抓取其后的名词即可。随后出现的 forest 形容的是整片立体方块屋，而不是题干考查的每个屋子的形状，注意排除干扰。因此答案为 tree。

questions.title: The Cube Houses sit on top of a 【   】 for pedestrians to the central city.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 pedestrians、central city；提示词 on the top of、a，此处应填地点类单数名词。
题目解析：本题不难。定位词 pedestrians 原词重现，题干中的 sit on top of 在录音中被替换为 are located right over，另一个定位词 central city 在录音中被替换为 city centre。注意随后出现的 streets 虽也表示地点，但在录音中未和 pedestrian 搭配使用，而且是复数形式，可排除。因此答案为 bridge。

questions.title: During construction, the work was temporarily discontinued because the designer faced the problem of 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 construction、designer；提示词 problem、of，此处应填表示问题类型的名词。
题目解析：本题不难，只需找准定位词即可。problem 较易发生替换，不能作定位词。construction 和 designer 在录音中均原词重现，答案信息紧随其后："… as the designer had difficulty in finance."其中 had difficulty in 替换了题干中的 faced the problem of。因此答案为 finance。

questions.title: Underneath the houses, there are three pillars made of 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 three pillars；提示词 made of，此处应填表示材料的名词。
题目解析：pillar 意为"柱子"，即使不认识该词，也可在看题干时先通过拼写知道它的大概发音。本题答案词的范围较小，雅思听力中常考的建筑材料类词汇有 concrete（混凝土）、wood（木材）、现代建筑材料 glass（玻璃）以及环保类材料 grass（草皮）等。本题答案与定位词一起出现，虽答案词前置修饰定位词，但整体变化不大。因此答案为 concrete。

questions.title: A new building is situated between a warehouse and a 【   】 of architecture.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 warehouse、architecture；提示词 warehouse、and a，此处应填表示建筑类型的单数名词。
题目解析：定位词 warehouse 于答案之后才出现，不过另一个定位词 architecture 于答案之前原词重现，据此还是可以轻松定位。答案句为："One of the two larger cubes was developed as an architecture school, and there is another building recently built between it and a warehouse."后一句中的 it 指的就是前面的 architecture school。相比题干的句型或说法，录音中的句型或说法顺序很可能会发生调换，所以不要死盯题干的形式做题。因此答案为 school。

questions.title: Both the lower level and the top level of each house are in the shape of a 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 lower level、top level；提示词 shape、a，此处应填表示形状的单数名词。
题目解析：本题不难，通过定位词可锁定答案句："… to reach the lower floor. This level and the top level are both triangle-shaped."其中 This level 指的就是 lower level，top level 原词重现，抓取符合预判的词汇即可。因此答案为 triangle。

questions.title: The top floor is sometimes used as a small 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 top floor、small；提示词 a，此处应填单数名词。
题目解析：通过定位词 top floor 和 small 即可锁定答案句："In some cases, the top floor is used as a small rooftop garden."其中 In some cases 替换了题干中的 sometimes，其他部分几乎没发生变化，只需要排除干扰词 rooftop 即可。无论是 small，还是 rooftop，它们都是为了修饰 garden。注意将听到的词汇代入题干，确保题干在语义和逻辑上都没问题。因此答案为 garden。

questions.title: There is a nearby market 【   】 across the square from the Cube Houses.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 market、square；提示词 a，此处应填单数名词。
题目解析：本题距离上一题较远，需耐心往下听。在大段无效信息之后才听到定位词 square 原词重现，随后另一定位词 market 和答案 hall 一起出现，此处的 hall 意为"大厅"。因此答案为 hall。

questions.title: For guests, two advantages of the house are its convenient 【   】 and reasonable price.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 guests、price；提示词 convenient，此处应填名词。
题目解析：题干中的 convenient 和 reasonable 较易发生替换，不能作定位词。首先听到定位词 guests 原词重现，而后听到了其中一个优势 ideal location，先抓取符合预判的名词 location，随后又听到另一个优势 fair price，对应题干中的 reasonable price，确认刚才记下的 location 就是正确答案。答案句为："What attracts guests most is its ideal location with a major railway station within a 5-minute walk."其中 ideal 和 with a major railway station within a 5-minute walk 对应了题干中的 convenient。因此答案为 location。

transcript.en: Good morning.
transcript.cn: 早上好。

transcript.en: In today's lecture, we're going to look at the Cube Houses, an iconic architectural complex in Rotterdam.
transcript.cn: 在今天的讲座里，我们要来看看方块屋，这是鹿特丹一处标志性的建筑群。

transcript.en: First, I'm going to be telling you about the history behind it.
transcript.cn: 首先，我要给大家讲讲它背后的历史。

transcript.en: As many may know, not much survived the bombing of Rotterdam during World War II, and it took a long while for the city to start the urban regeneration project.
transcript.cn: 很多人可能都知道，二战期间鹿特丹遭到轰炸，没剩下多少建筑，这座城市过了很久才启动城市重建项目。

transcript.en: Dutch architect Piet Blom designed Rotterdam's Cube Houses in the late-'70s at the request of the city's planners.
transcript.cn: 荷兰建筑师Piet Blom应城市规划者的邀请，在70年代末设计了鹿特丹的方块屋。

transcript.en: He had previously experimented with cubic architecture in the city of Helmond.
transcript.cn: 在此之前，他曾在Helmond市尝试过立方体建筑。

transcript.en: So when he was offered this project in the Oude Haven area of the city, he decided to expand upon his original idea.
transcript.cn: 所以当他接到这个位于市区Oude Haven地区的项目时，他决定在自己最初的构想上进一步发挥。

transcript.en: Blom believed that urban communities should live together under an urban roof.
transcript.cn: Blom认为，城市社区应该在一个“城市屋顶”下共同生活。

transcript.en: He designed the Cube Houses to recreate daily life in a village where individuals are closely connected and yet have their own separate space.
transcript.cn: 他设计方块屋，是为了重现村庄里的日常生活——在那里人们彼此紧密相连，却又各自拥有独立的空间。

transcript.en: And even after more than 30 years, the Cube Houses remain one of the city's most eye-catching developments.
transcript.cn: 即便过了三十多年，方块屋依然是这座城市最引人注目的开发项目之一。

transcript.en: It's easy to see why: these striking homes are cubes tilted 45-degree on their side.
transcript.cn: 原因不难看出：这些醒目的房屋是一个个倾斜45度侧立的立方体。

transcript.en: The result is buildings that look, feel and behave unlike anything you'll find elsewhere in the world.
transcript.cn: 由此建成的房子，无论是外观、感觉还是使用方式，都和你在世界其他地方能见到的任何建筑都不一样。

transcript.en: The concept behind these houses is that each elevated cube seems like a tree.
transcript.cn: 这些房屋背后的构思是，每一个被架高的立方体都像一棵树。

transcript.en: And collectively, the Cube Houses are in the shape of a forest with each triangular roof representing a treetop.
transcript.cn: 而所有方块屋合在一起，就构成了一片森林的形状，每一个三角形的屋顶都代表着一个树冠。

transcript.en: Interestingly, these houses are located right over a pedestrian bridge across one of the busiest streets into the city centre next to a railway station.
transcript.cn: 有意思的是，这些房屋正好架在一座人行天桥的上方，天桥横跨着一条通往市中心最繁忙的街道之一，旁边就是一个火车站。

transcript.en: The traffic-free area that connects the cubes includes a little children's playground, as well as small offices and studios.
transcript.cn: 连接各个立方体的无车区域里有一个小小的儿童游乐场，还有一些小办公室和工作室。

transcript.en: With thriving restaurants and cafés right on the doorstep, they were designed with the community very much in mind.
transcript.cn: 门口一带餐馆和咖啡馆生意兴隆，这些房屋在设计时就充分考虑到了社区生活。

transcript.en: However, the cube housing's development endured various challenges and complications during design and construction, and it once stopped as the designer had difficulty in finance.
transcript.cn: 不过，方块屋的开发在设计和施工期间经历了各种困难和波折，还曾因为设计师遇到资金问题而一度停工。

transcript.en: Luckily, the project resumed within 2 weeks after the designer received another round of grants from the city council.
transcript.cn: 幸运的是，设计师从市议会拿到了新一轮的拨款后，项目在两周内就恢复了。

transcript.en: So what makes the Cube Houses different from traditional architecture?
transcript.cn: 那么，方块屋和传统建筑到底有什么不同呢？

transcript.en: Let's look at some of its unique design features.
transcript.cn: 我们来看看它的一些独特设计特点。

transcript.en: Each cube house has a space of 100 square metres and is divided into 3 floors, and it is very striking to see these houses fixed on one angle.
transcript.cn: 每栋方块屋的面积是100平方米，分为三层，看到这些房子固定成一个倾斜的角度，非常令人震撼。

transcript.en: The tilted residences are constructed on three concrete pillars.
transcript.cn: 这些倾斜的住宅建在三根混凝土柱子上。

transcript.en: The whole construction is made of 38 regular cube units all connected together with two supersized cubes at both ends of the string.
transcript.cn: 整个建筑由38个标准立方体单元组成，全部连接在一起，两端各有一个超大号的立方体。

transcript.en: One of the two larger cubes was developed as an architecture school, and there is another building recently built between it and a warehouse.
transcript.cn: 两个较大的立方体中，有一个被开发成了一所建筑学校，最近还在它和一座仓库之间建了另一栋楼。

transcript.en: Standing at three-floors tall, their ground floor is the entrance.
transcript.cn: 房子高三层，一层是入口。

transcript.en: When you enter a cube house, the first thing to get used to is that all the walls are slanted.
transcript.cn: 走进方块屋，首先要适应的就是所有的墙都是倾斜的。

transcript.en: You must take a narrow staircase to reach the lower floor.
transcript.cn: 你得走一段狭窄的楼梯才能到下面那一层。

transcript.en: This level and the top level are both triangle-shaped.
transcript.cn: 这一层和最上面一层都是三角形的。

transcript.en: The lower level contains an open kitchen and a living room.
transcript.cn: 下面一层有一个开放式厨房和一个客厅。

transcript.en: The medium level houses a bathroom and two bedrooms, while the top level provides a great view since the apex of the room is a three-sided pyramid with windows all around.
transcript.cn: 中间一层是一个卫生间和两间卧室，而最上面一层视野极好，因为房间的顶端是一个三面的金字塔造型，四周都是窗户。

transcript.en: In some cases, the top floor is used as a small rooftop garden.
transcript.cn: 有些情况下，最上面一层被用作一个小小的屋顶花园。

transcript.en: And as you enter the top half of the structure, your initial inclination may well be to mind your head.
transcript.cn: 而当你走进这个结构的上半部分时，你第一反应很可能是得小心别撞到头。

transcript.en: Now that you know the history and design features behind these odd-looking houses, you might be thinking about how it is to live in them.
transcript.cn: 现在你已经了解了这些造型古怪的房子背后的历史和设计特点，也许你正在琢磨住在里面是什么感觉。

transcript.en: After curious bystanders kept disturbing the Cube Houses' residents, one shrewd owner opened the Show Cube Museum, which gives visitors the chance to take a tour around a fully furnished cube house.
transcript.cn: 由于好奇的路人不断打扰方块屋的居民，一位精明的屋主开办了“样板方块屋博物馆”，让参观者有机会参观一栋布置完整的方块屋。

transcript.en: It also highlights some of the everyday challenges that the residents face, such as buying and fitting furniture for a structure without straight walls.
transcript.cn: 它还着重展示了居民们面临的一些日常难题，比如为一栋没有直墙的房子买家具、装家具。

transcript.en: In recent years, Rotterdam's Cube Houses have been joined by another architectural icon just across the square.
transcript.cn: 近年来，鹿特丹方块屋的对面广场又添了另一座建筑地标。

transcript.en: Rotterdam's market hall, the largest indoor market in the Netherlands, is another multipurpose residential and retail complex that will live long in your memory – as well as helping to fill your belly with tasty treats.
transcript.cn: 鹿特丹的市场大厅是荷兰最大的室内市场，也是一处集住宅与零售于一体的多功能综合体，它会长久地留在你的记忆里——同时还能让你饱餐一顿美味。

transcript.en: In 2009, the Rotterdam-based Personal Architecture BNA converted one of the larger cubes for one of the leading Stayokay hostel chains in the Netherlands.
transcript.cn: 2009年，总部位于鹿特丹的Personal Architecture BNA事务所把其中一个较大的立方体改造成了荷兰领先的Stayokay连锁青年旅舍之一。

transcript.en: Today, the hostel invites everyone to experience what it's like to live in a Cube House and enjoy a stunning panoramic vista of the surrounding area.
transcript.cn: 如今，这家旅舍邀请每个人来体验住在方块屋里是什么感觉，并饱览周边地区的绝美全景。

transcript.en: What attracts guests most is its ideal location with a major railway station within a 5-minute walk.
transcript.cn: 最吸引住客的是它绝佳的地理位置，步行5分钟就能到一个大型火车站。

transcript.en: The accommodation is also offered at a fair price, which appeals to visitors both from home and abroad …
transcript.cn: 住宿价格也很公道，吸引了国内外的游客……
